introSection: Dragon's Fury is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Chessington World of Adventures in Chessington, Greater London, England, UK. It is located in the "Land Of The Dragons" area of the park.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Dragon's Fury opened on 27 March 2004.

The attraction was closed in 2015 following an accident on The Smiler at Alton Towers so that Merlin could install new safety protocols.

sections.title: Layout
sections.content: The car leaves the station and makes it up the first chain lift hill before entering a curved drop under a bridge and transitioning into the horseshoe element, for the rest of the ride it makes its way around the "Land Of The Dragons" area and includes multiple hills, helices and a second lift hill.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Each row sits back-to-back and faces away from each other.

fullText:
Dragon's Fury is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Chessington World of Adventures in Chessington, Greater London, England, UK. It is located in the "Land Of The Dragons" area of the park.

Dragon's Fury opened on 27 March 2004.

The attraction was closed in 2015 following an accident on The Smiler at Alton Towers so that Merlin could install new safety protocols.



The car leaves the station and makes it up the first chain lift hill before entering a curved drop under a bridge and transitioning into the horseshoe element, for the rest of the ride it makes its way around the "Land Of The Dragons" area and includes multiple hills, helices and a second lift hill.

Each row sits back-to-back and faces away from each other.
